blog.theme.info: ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବ୍ଲଗ୍‌ର ରୂପ କଷ୍ଟମାଇଜ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ: ଏକ ପ୍ରିସେଟ୍ ବାଛନ୍ତୁ କିମ୍ବା ରଙ୍ଗ, ଫଣ୍ଟ ଏବଂ ଆକୃତି ଅଲଗା ଅଲଗା ସଜାଡ଼ନ୍ତୁ। ଲାଇଟ୍ ଏବଂ ଡାର୍କ ମୋଡ୍ ପାଇଁ ରଙ୍ଗ ଅଲଗା ସେଟ୍ ହୁଏ।
blog.slug.explained: Create a nice-looking URL for the post. Avoid using special characters except for "-".
blog.settings.universeSettings: Universe blogs are integrated into universe pages with their basic settings taken from universe settings.
blog.settings.organizationSettings: ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନ ବ୍ଲଗଗୁଡ଼ିକ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନ ପୃଷ୍ଠାମାନଙ୍କୁ ସଂଯୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି।
blogs.title: Blogs of Literary Universe
blogs.description: Listing of blogs on the Literary Universe platform.
blog.literaryCommentary.description: Select a story or universe from your library to provide literary commentary on:
blog.qa.settings.title: Q&A Settings
blog.qa.settings.notSupported: Q&A is currently only supported for user and universe blogs.
blog.qa.settings.enableQA.help: When enabled, readers can submit questions that you can answer publicly or privately.
blog.qa.settings.askersAllowed.all.help: Free users get 1 question per blog lifetime. LU subscribers get 1 question per year (2 in their first year).
blog.qa.settings.askersAllowed.luOnly.he: Only users with an active LU subscription can ask questions.
blog.qa.settings.askersAllowed.fanClubOn: Only your Fan Club members can ask questions (limits defined per tier).
blog.qa.settings.askersAllowed.luOrFanCl: LU subscribers or Fan Club members
Users with either an LU subscription or Fan Club membership can ask questions.
blog.qa.settings.showArchiveWhenDisabled: Show answered questions even when Q&A is disabled
When disabled, readers won't be able to ask new questions, but they can still view previously answered questions.
blog.qa.admin.title: Manage Q&A
blog.qa.admin.confirmIgnore: Are you sure you want to ignore this question?
blog.qa.references.title: References
blog.qa.reference.type: {type, select, encyclopedia {📚 Encyclopedia} story {📖 Story} blog {📝 Blog} other {Reference}}
blog.qa.outdated.title: Outdated Status
blog.qa.outdated.marked: This question is marked as outdated.
blog.qa.title: Questions
blog.qa.success.submit: Thank you! Your question has been submitted and will be answered soon.
blog.qa.error.submit: Failed to submit question. Please try again.
blog.qa.empty.mine: You have not asked any questions here yet.
blog.qa.role.author: Author
blog.qa.warn.luRequired: Only LU subscribers can ask questions here.
blog.qa.warn.fanClubRequired: Only Fan Club members can ask questions here.
blog.qa.warn.luOrFanRequired: Only LU subscribers or Fan Club members can ask questions here.
blogs.discussionOnForum: The discussion for this blog post continues on our forums.
blog.posts.empty: You don't have any posts yet. Create your first post to get started.
blog.theme.previewText: ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବ୍ଲଗ୍‌ର ପ୍ୟାନେଲ୍ ଏବଂ ଲେଖା ଏହିପରି ଦେଖାଯିବ।
admin.blog.resetTheme: ଥିମ୍ ଏବଂ ହେଡର୍ ଛବି ରିସେଟ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ
admin.blog.noTheme: ଏହି ବ୍ଲଗ୍‌ରେ କୌଣସି ଡିଜାଇନ୍ କଷ୍ଟମାଇଜେସନ୍ ନାହିଁ।
blog.pages.empty: ଆପଣଙ୍କର ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ କୌଣସି ପୃଷ୍ଠା ନାହିଁ। ପୃଷ୍ଠା ପୋଷ୍ଟ ନୁହେଁ ଏମିତି ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ — ଯେପରି ମୋ ବିଷୟରେ କିମ୍ବା କମିଶନ।
blog.pages.publishHint: ଏଠାରେ “ପ୍ରକାଶ” ପୃଷ୍ଠାର ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ ସଂରକ୍ଷଣ କରେ। ପୃଷ୍ଠା ତାଲିକାରୁ ଏହାକୁ ଦୃଶ୍ୟମାନ କରନ୍ତୁ।
blog.menus.info: ମେନୁ ଆଇଟମ୍ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପୃଷ୍ଠା, ବ୍ଲଗ୍‌ର ଅନ୍ତର୍ନିର୍ମିତ ବିଭାଗ କିମ୍ବା ବାହାର ସାଇଟ୍ ସହ ଲିଙ୍କ୍ କରେ।
blog.menus.label: ଲେବଲ୍
blog.domains.info: ଏହି ବ୍ଲଗ୍‌କୁ ଏହାର ନିଜ ଠିକଣାରୁ ପରିବେଷଣ କରନ୍ତୁ। ପାଠକମାନେ ପରିଷ୍କାର ଲିଙ୍କ୍ ପାଆନ୍ତି; ଲେଖା ଏବଂ ପରିଚାଳନା ଏଠାରେ ରହେ।
blog.domains.customComing: ନିଜ ଡୋମେନ୍ ଯୋଡ଼ିବା (ଯେପରି blog.apananama.com) ଶୀଘ୍ର ଆସୁଛି।
